title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally on macOS, Linux, or Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete, and create models via a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun, and browsers via the same REST endpoints.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chat, completion, embeddings, and tool-calling inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); chat with multiple models, upload docs/RAG, manage models, user auth.

title: oll4ma.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat with Ollama models inside the editor; inline code generation, explain, refactor, and more.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI to chat over your documents locally.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo showing how to expose Python functions as tools that Ollama models can call (OpenAI-style tool use).

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that remembers context, switches models, and runs entirely on local Ollama server.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that proxies chats to your Ollama instance; supports groups, private chats, streaming, and model selection.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for building production-ready RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI copilots powered by Ollama; inline autocomplete, explain, test generation.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate offering async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API with strong typing and streaming support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; synchronous and asynchronous APIs, streaming, embeddings, and Maven Central availability.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that listens in servers and threads, streaming Ollama responses with slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Go, Ruby, C#, Swift, and more, maintained by the Ollama team.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django + Channels project that exposes a web chat interface and REST endpoint backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, and ingress.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama; cross-platform, no browser required, packaged as native app.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of Modelfiles for community-tuned or quantized LLMs ready to import into Ollama.
